summary: Work Order System Testing - Backend 24/24 tests PASSED (100%), Frontend UI working correctly. All features verified: CRUD operations, 4-level approval pipeline (SE Request → PM → Planning → Accountant), reject/revert functionality.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_work_order_payment_pipeline.py - Created new test file for payment approval pipeline
seed_data_creation: Backend tests create and cleanup TEST_ prefixed work orders. Existing test work order: wo_1787c639 with 3 stages
context_for_next_testing_agent: Work Order system fully functional. Backend uses 'project_work_orders' collection. 4-level approval pipeline: Site Engineer requests payment (status: requested) → PM approves (status: pm_approved) → Planning approves (status: planning_approved) → Accountant processes (status: approved/paid). Reject sets status to 'rejected', revert sets back to 'pending'.

backend_tests_verified.GET /api/projects/{project_id}/work-orde: PASS - Returns list from project_work_orders collection
PASS - Returns single work order with scope_items, stages, additional_work
backend_tests_verified.POST /api/projects/{project_id}/work-ord: PASS - Creates work order with stage_id for each stage
backend_tests_verified.PATCH /api/projects/{project_id}/work-or: PASS - Updates work order preserving stage statuses
backend_tests_verified.PATCH .../stages/{stage_id}/request-paym: PASS - Site Engineer requests payment, status → requested
backend_tests_verified.PATCH .../stages/{stage_id}/approve (PM): PASS - PM approves requested stage, status → pm_approved
backend_tests_verified.PATCH .../stages/{stage_id}/approve (Pla: PASS - Planning approves pm_approved stage, status → planning_approved
backend_tests_verified.PATCH .../stages/{stage_id}/approve (Acc: PASS - Accountant processes, status → approved, paid_amount updated
backend_tests_verified.PATCH .../stages/{stage_id}/approve (rej: PASS - Any approver can reject, status → rejected with reason
backend_tests_verified.PATCH .../stages/{stage_id}/revert: PASS - Site Engineer reverts rejected stage to pending
backend_tests_verified.Permission checks: PASS - Accountant cannot create work orders (403), Planning cannot skip PM approval (400)

frontend_tests_verified.ProjectDetail Work Orders tab: PASS - Renders work orders list with paid/pending badges
frontend_tests_verified.Work Order detail view: PASS - Shows scope items, stages (3 sub-tabs), additional work
frontend_tests_verified.Stage approval trail: PASS - Shows SE Requested → PM OK → Planning OK → Paid badges
frontend_tests_verified.SiteEngineerProject Work Orders tab: PASS - Shows contractor payment cards with Request Payment button
frontend_tests_verified.Page loads without crash: PASS - Null safety fix working, no 'Cannot read properties of undefined' error
